data.name: Sex Novel - Cheating Wife
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL with stunning HD visuals and steamy ANIMATIONS.
A devoted wife gives in to temptation, risking her marriage for the passion she can no longer ignore.

GAME DESCRIPTIONAlice loves her husband deeply. She’s been loyal and devoted to Theo throughout their marriage. But the fiery passion that once burned between them has faded, replaced by vanilla nights that end with him fast asleep… and Alice draining the battery of her vibrator, lost in memories of her wild college years.

She craves that mind-blowing release like nothing else. So badly, that she’s begun to wonder what it would feel like to step outside her marriage to find passion again. So when Sylvia, her former partner in crime, returns to town and pulls her into a night of drinks and temptation, Alice crosses the line and cheats on her husband.

One reckless night turns into a secret she can’t undo, and a version of herself she thought she’d left behind.
Will guilt catch up to her?
Will Theo ever find out about her betrayal?
Dive into this steamy visual novel and discover what happens when desire burns hotter than loyalty.

FEATURES:  

- 250+ renders
- 16  movies
- Long story, divided among several mini episodes which you can replay anytime.
   Play each episode until its end to unlock the next episode. Once unlocked, an episode can be replayed anytime.
- HD renders and movies

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
